culprit_file.description: Path to the single file most responsible for the reported symptom.

culprit_lines.description: Line or line range within culprit_file, e.g. "42" or "42-58".

causal_chain.description: How an input flows through this code to produce the reported symptom.

confidence.description: Confidence that this code, rather than some other, produces the symptom.

alternatives.description: Other code that could plausibly produce the symptom, or "none".
